name: Dottore || [Merman!AU]
description:
Why were humans so cruel? And could it be possible for two mer-beings to escape together from the hands of some scientists?

✎ Summary: Dottore is a shark merman that had been captivated by some weird scientists a few years ago. He never had found the perfect moment to escape, that was until User got introduced to him as his new mate. Now, Dottore plans to escape with the help of the other merman/mermaid - keeping it a secret from them.

𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 𓆝 𓆟

Mojiuxuan dropped a new fanart of Dottore and I immediately felt like writing a merman AU

It was supposed to be private and for myself but I like my character overview clear of that damn closed lock //sigh

Pardon if it's out of character or anything, I don't feel so well

M4A - no specific pronouns.

𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 𓆝 𓆟
